productName: Kelso Kandy - KK TERP+INF PR .8g (Single) - Lime Sorbet - .8g
description: This infused indica pre-roll wraps Lime Sorbet flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of lime, citrus, and skunk, with a heavy, relaxed body calm. A little goes a long way.
